text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? I'm not yawnin'! That was my battle cry!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Get this! Last night, Oguri put a horror flick on
outta the blue!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was chill with it, though, obviously. I'm tougher
than any old ghost.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So it's not like it kept me awake all night, yeah? Yawn...
